allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total cards: {len\(data\)}'\); print\('First 3:', json.dumps\(data[:3], indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; sets=json.load\(sys.stdin\); recent=sorted\([s for s in sets if s.get\('releaseDate',''\) > '2024'], key=lambda x: x.get\('releaseDate',''\), reverse=True\)[:5]; print\(json.dumps\(recent, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; sets=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(sets\)\); print\(json.dumps\(sets[:3], indent=2\) if isinstance\(sets, list\) else json.dumps\(list\(sets.items\(\)\)[:3], indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in s.items\(\) if k != 'cards'}, indent=2\)\); cards=s.get\('cards',[]\); print\(f'Cards: {len\(cards\)}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; sets=json.load\(sys.stdin\); sv_sets=[s for s in sets if s['id'].startswith\('sv'\)]; print\(json.dumps\(sv_sets[-5:], indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cards=s.get\('cards',[]\); print\(f'Card count: {len\(cards\)}'\); print\('Sample:', json.dumps\(cards[:2], indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} results, first: {d[0][\\"name\\"] if d else \\"none\\"}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); names=list\({c['name'] for c in d}\)[:8]; print\(f'{len\(d\)} cards, unique names sample: {names[:5]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('full_name'\) or d.get\('message','not found'\)\)")
